exampleSentences: Em bây giờ ăn cơm trưa
Anh bây giờ gọi mẹ anh
Chị bây giờ học tiếng Việt
notes:
bây giờ means now, at this moment. It talks about what is happening in the present time.

It’s a time adverb, so it usually goes before or after the subject, but before the main verb is very common.  

It can also contrast past and present, like “before vs. now.”  

Close words: hiện tại = “currently” (more formal), ngay bây giờ = “right now” (more urgent/strong).
notes_md:
**bây giờ** means *now*, at this moment. It talks about what is happening in the present time.

It’s a time adverb, so it usually goes before or after the subject, but before the main verb is very common.  

It can also contrast past and present, like “before vs. now.”  

Close words: **hiện tại** = “currently” (more formal), **ngay bây giờ** = “right now” (more urgent/strong).
sentenceBreakdowns: Em (I) + bây giờ (now) + ăn (eat) + cơm trưa (lunch)
Anh (he) + bây giờ (now) + gọi (call) + mẹ anh (his mother)
Chị (she) + bây giờ (now) + học (study) + tiếng Việt (Vietnamese)

example.vi: Tôi đang học tiếng Việt bây giờ.

definitions.en: Refers to the present time or moment.
definitions.vi: Chỉ thời điểm hiện tại, lúc này.
